reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Gira One Server
reauth_confirm.description: The credentials for the Gira One Server at {host} are no longer valid. Please enter the updated username and password.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Gira One Server. Check host and network.
error.registration_failed: Failed to register client with the Gira One Server.
error.device_locked: The Gira One Server is currently locked. Try again later.

abort.already_configured: This Gira One Server is already configured.
